steps.title: Identify the restoration signal
steps.content: The phrase “making the data available again” is key. The word again signals that the data-transfer project is restoring something that was previously inaccessible or dormant.

steps.title: Match the target meaning
steps.content:
The blank needs a word meaning to restore or revive usefulness. Renewing expresses this directly — to make something useful again. The other choices describe different actions: persisting (continuing), installing (setting up), and exceeding (surpassing) all miss the restoration idea that again signals.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
